title: THIS Is What Happens If You Visit Skinwalker Ranch

transcript.text: welcome to Skinwalker Ranch the world's
greatest and most freaky paranormal hot
spot located in the Uinta Basin in
western Utah the current owner of the
ranch is a guy named Brandon fugle he's
a Real Estate Mogul and Patron for
Frontier science bugle has gathered a
team of hard-headed scientists to gather
real data on all of the bizarre
anomalies around the ranch they've set
up various sensors and run constant
experiments and unlike their government
predecessors they plan to open source
the data and share it with the public
fugle's team has encountered some pretty
insane stuff electromagnetic anomalies
with phones electronics and tri-field
meters they've seen orbs cattle
mutilations they've personally
experienced biological effects in fact
visitors along with members of their
team have been hospitalized they even
have photos and live footage of UFOs in
the airspace of the property
